title: Interactive Dog Ball, Smart Ball Ball Interactive Dog Toys, Cat Toys for Indoor Cats Kitten for Cats Dogs USB Rechargeable (Red)
features: Interactive Pet Smart Ball Toy: This Interactive electric automatic cat toys is the ultimate entertainment for your furry friends—whether they are cats or dogs! With just a press of a button, the ball starts spinning, moving, and shaking, instantly captivating your pet to chase and catch it. It's a fun and engaging way to keep your pets active and happy.

Durable and Pet-safe Materials: The active rolling ball with tail for dogs is made of eco-friendly, high-impact ABS material that is soft, skin-friendly, and safe for both cats and dogs. Its strong rolling friction is quiet, and the sturdy construction ensures it won't break even with rough play. This toy is designed to last, offering reliable and safe fun for your pets.

Three Engaging Modes: The Interactive Smart Ball Toy offers three modes—fast, slow, and interactive—allowing you to choose the best mode to match your pet's energy level and mood. Whether it's for energetic dogs or playful cats, there's a mode that will fit their play style perfectly.

Flexible and exclusive use of various venues: When rechargeable irregular moving toys for dogs encounters an obstacle, it will move irregularly to stimulate the puppy's curiosity and desire to explore.

Quick Charging for Long-lasting Fun: Featuring the latest battery technology, this toy charges fully in just 30 minutes, providing up to 3 hours of continuous entertainment. Your pets will love the extended playtime, and you’ll appreciate the convenience of quick charging!
description: Product Description Fast mode Simulates the scene of small animals running away quickly, stimulates cats' chasing instincts, and helps them release excess energy. Slow mode Suitable for young or old cats, the gentle movement speed allows cats to chase easily, cultivates their agility and reaction ability. Interactive mode Interact with cats in real time. After sensing the approach of cats, the rolling ball will move quickly, increasing the fun and making the interaction between pets and toys closer. Red light flashes quickly Low voltage indication
